query:
SELECT rp.id, rp.categoryId, ac.name as categoryName, rp.feedItemId, fi.name as feedItem,
  rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay, rp.isActive, rp.effectiveDate, rp.endDate,
  ph.pricePerUnit, ph.effectiveDate as priceEffectiveDate
FROM ration_plans rp
LEFT JOIN animal_categories ac ON ac.id = rp.categoryId
LEFT JOIN feed_items fi ON fi.id = rp.feedItemId
LEFT JOIN feed_item_price_history ph ON ph.feedItemId = fi.id
WHERE rp.categoryId = 5 AND rp.deletedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY ph.effectiveDate DESC;

SELECT rp.id, rp.categoryId, ac.name as categoryName, rp.feedItemId, fi.name as feedItem,
  rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay, rp.isActive, rp.effectiveDate, rp.endDate,
  ph.pricePerUnit, ph.effectiveDate as priceEffectiveDate
FROM ration_plans rp
LEFT JOIN animal_categories ac ON ac.id = rp.categoryId
LEFT JOIN feed_items fi ON fi.id = rp.feedItemId
LEFT JOIN feed_item_price_history ph ON ph.feedItemId = fi.id
WHERE rp.categoryId = 5 AND rp.deletedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY ph.effectiveDate DESC;
